While not explicitly listed with this exact name, it seems most similar to activities involving photography and city exploration. Since I can only map items that are explicitly in the ground-truth ratings, and 'Photography Tour of Alfama & Belem' doesn't have an exact match, I'll only include the items that have clear matches in the ground-truth data.
